name: GlobalSign
description: GlobalSign — global certificate authority providing PKI, identity, and certificate lifecycle management.

seo.title: GlobalSign — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: GlobalSign: GlobalSign — global certificate authority providing PKI, identity, and certificate lifecycle management.

when_to_use: PKI-as-a-service for enterprise certificate lifecycle automation
Code signing certificates for DevSecOps CI/CD pipelines
TLS certificate issuance for high-volume SaaS platforms
IoT device identity provisioning with GlobalSign Atlas
Document signing certificates for legally binding workflows

pros: Established CA with global trust roots
Covers TLS, S/MIME, code signing, IoT
cons: ACME automation less polished than newer CAs
review.verdict: Solid traditional CA for enterprises; overkill when free CAs meet your trust needs.
review.best_for: Enterprises consolidating cert issuance and identity under one trusted CA.
review.not_for: Small teams fine with Let's Encrypt or ZeroSSL.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
